name: Moritz
long_description:
Moritz is a global AI-native law firm that will handle your legal work the same day, at a fraction of the market price.

Our AI does 80% of the work, so you pay our elite lawyers for the final 20%.

Our lawyers have closed $2bn in deals with an average turnaround of 4-hours. No other law firm offers this kind of speed for complex deals.
one_liner: Global AI-native law firm handling legal work with same-day turnaround
